title: Verify the presence of all menu options
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Verify that all menu options: 'Explore,' 'My Playlist,' 'Categories / Genres,' 'Featured Playlist,' 'More App,' and 'Exit' are present.
expected_result: All menu options are visible and accessible.

title: Click on each menu option and verify navigation
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on each menu option: 'Explore,' 'My Playlist,' 'Categories / Genres,' 'Featured Playlist,' 'More App,' and 'Exit'. | Verify that each option navigates to the expected screen.
expected_result: Each menu option navigates to the expected screen.

title: Search functionality
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on the 'Search' icon in the header. | Enter a search term and verify that the search results are displayed.
expected_result: The search term is entered and search results are displayed.

title: Verify the presence of album covers and titles
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Verify that the three list rows with album covers and titles: 'Solo Alabanza y Adoración,' 'BALADA,' and 'MARCOS VIDAL' are present.
expected_result: All album covers and titles are visible.

title: Verify the blurred background image
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Verify that the blurred background image of a concert with silhouettes of people raising their hands is present.
expected_result: The blurred background image is visible.

title: Verify the 'Exit' option
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on the 'Exit' option. | Verify that the app exits.

title: Verify the 'More App' option
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on the 'More App' option. | Verify that the 'More App' screen is displayed.

title: Verify the 'Categories / Genres' option
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on the 'Categories / Genres' option. | Verify that the 'Categories / Genres' screen is displayed.

title: Verify the 'Featured Playlist' option
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on the 'Featured Playlist' option. | Verify that the 'Featured Playlist' screen is displayed.
